mapper.select: SELECT LC.LEARN_ID AS ID, LL.LEARN_LIST_ID, LL.CLASS_ID, LL.TEACHER_ID, LC.TITLE, CASE WHEN LC.ATTACH_URL IS NOT NULL AND (INSTR(LOWER(LC.ATTACH_URL), 'http://') = 1 OR INSTR(LOWER(LC.ATTACH_URL), 'https://') = 1) THEN '링크' WHEN LC.ATTACH_URL IS NOT NULL THEN '파일' WHEN LC.GUIDE_POINT IS NOT NULL THEN '지문읽기' ELSE '영상' END AS TYPE, CASE WHEN NVL(LC.REQUIRED_YN, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS REQUIRED, CASE WHEN LC.END_DATE IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE > LC.END_DATE THEN '마감' WHEN LC.START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE < LC.START_DATE THEN '대기중' ELSE '운영중' END AS STATUS, TO_CHAR(LC.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_CHAR(LC.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, TO_CHAR(LC.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DEADLINE, NVL(LC.TARGET_TIME, 0) AS DURATION, LC.ATTACH_URL AS LINK_URL, LC.CONTENT, LC.GUIDE_POINT AS TEXT_CONTENT, '전체 (' || ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = LL.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ) || '명)' AS TARGET, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_FBD LF JOIN LEARN_PRO LP ON LF.PROGRESS_ID = LP.PROGRESS_ID WHERE LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID AND NVL(LF.DIFFICULT_YN, 0) = 1 ) AS DIFFICULT_COUNT, CASE WHEN NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS DELETED, TO_CHAR(LC.DELETED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DELETED_AT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_PRO LP WHERE LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID AND LP.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' ) AS COMPLETED_COUNT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_PRO LP WHERE LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID AND LP.STATUS IS NOT NULL AND LP.STATUS != 'COMPLETED' ) AS IN_PROGRESS_COUNT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = LL.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ) - ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_PRO LP WHERE LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID ) AS NOT_STARTED_COUNT, CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = LL.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_PRO LP WHERE LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID AND LP.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' ) * 100 / ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = LL.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ) ) END AS COMPLETION_RATE, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = LL.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ) AS TOTAL_STUDENT_COUNT FROM LEARN_LIST LL JOIN LEARN_CONT LC ON LL.LEARN_LIST_ID = LC.LEARN_LIST_ID WHERE LL.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND LL.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = #{trashYn} ORDER BY LC.CREATED_AT DESC, LC.LEARN_ID DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT LC.LEARN_ID AS ID, LL.LEARN_LIST_ID, LL.CLASS_ID, LL.TEACHER_ID, LC.TITLE, CASE WHEN LC.ATTACH_URL IS NOT NULL AND (INSTR(LOWER(LC.ATTACH_URL), 'http://') = 1 OR INSTR(LOWER(LC.ATTACH_URL), 'https://') = 1) THEN '링크' WHEN LC.ATTACH_URL IS NOT NULL THEN '파일' WHEN LC.GUIDE_POINT IS NOT NULL THEN '지문읽기' ELSE '영상' END AS TYPE, CASE WHEN NVL(LC.REQUIRED_YN, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS REQUIRED, CASE WHEN LC.END_DATE IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE > LC.END_DATE THEN '마감' WHEN LC.START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE < LC.START_DATE THEN '대기중' ELSE '운영중' END AS STATUS, TO_CHAR(LC.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_CHAR(LC.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, TO_CHAR(LC.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DEADLINE, NVL(LC.TARGET_TIME, 0) AS DURATION, LC.ATTACH_URL AS LINK_URL, LC.CONTENT, LC.GUIDE_POINT AS TEXT_CONTENT, '전체 (' || ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = LL.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ) || '명)' AS TARGET, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_FBD LF JOIN LEARN_PRO LP ON LF.PROGRESS_ID = LP.PROGRESS_ID WHERE LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID AND NVL(LF.DIFFICULT_YN, 0) = 1 ) AS DIFFICULT_COUNT, CASE WHEN NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS DELETED, TO_CHAR(LC.DELETED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DELETED_AT, 0 AS COMPLETED_COUNT, 0 AS IN_PROGRESS_COUNT, 0 AS NOT_STARTED_COUNT, 0 AS COMPLETION_RATE, 0 AS TOTAL_STUDENT_COUNT FROM LEARN_LIST LL JOIN LEARN_CONT LC ON LL.LEARN_LIST_ID = LC.LEARN_LIST_ID WHERE LL.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND LL.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND LC.LEARN_ID = #{learnId} )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LEARN_LIST ( LEARN_LIST_ID, CLASS_ID, TEACHER_ID, TITLE, START_DATE, END_DATE, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{learnListId}, #{classId}, #{teacherId}, #{dto.title}, TO_DATE(#{dto.startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{dto.deadline}, 1, 10), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO LEARN_CONT ( LEARN_ID, LEARN_LIST_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, REQUIRED_YN, START_DATE, END_DATE, TARGET_TIME, GUIDE_POINT, ATTACH_URL, DELETE_YN, DELETED_AT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{learnId}, #{learnListId}, #{dto.title}, #{dto.content}, CASE WHEN #{dto.required} = 'true' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, TO_DATE(#{dto.startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{dto.deadline}, 1, 16), 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI'), #{dto.duration}, #{dto.textContent}, #{dto.linkUrl}, 0, NULL, SYSDATE )
